summary: Added browser-local Gate Radar operator notes so blockers can carry private annotations per lane and signal without mutating the snapshot or contacting agents.

pattern_notes: Blocker and incident triage surfaces should reduce coordination overhead by keeping context close to the active issue.
Dashboard notes should be compact and tied to the visible object so they preserve scan speed.
Local annotations are useful for operator memory as long as they are clearly distinguished from source-of-truth data.

data_contract: Gate Radar notes are stored only in browser localStorage under agent-company-atlas.gate-radar-notes.v1.
Notes are keyed by lane id and radar signal id, with text capped and normalized before persistence.
The snapshot remains read-only; saving or clearing a note does not write files, mutate SQLite, stage dispatches, send messages, or contact agents.
Note focus is browser-session UI state; saved note text persists locally.
ui_notes: The Gate Radar console now includes an Operator Notes panel with pinned count, focused signal title, textarea, SAVE, and CLEAR actions.
Each Gate Radar card exposes ADD or NOTE controls and shows a compact note preview when a note exists.
Mobile layout stretches note buttons and keeps textarea/card text unclipped.

red.result: Expected failure before implementation: panel true, notePanel false, noteButtons 0, noteInput false, stored null, no console errors.

green.result: ok true; panel/input/buttons present; saved note persisted to localStorage; reload restored pinned count and input value; clear removed note and storage entry; card focus worked; no overflow, clipping, console errors, or failed requests.

responsive: phone 390: ok true; notePanel true; textarea true; addButtons 3; boardColumns 1; no overflow/clipped text/errors.
tablet 820: ok true; notePanel true; textarea true; addButtons 3; boardColumns 1; no overflow/clipped text/errors.
desktop 1280: ok true; notePanel true; textarea true; addButtons 3; boardColumns 2; no overflow/clipped text/errors.
wide 1600: ok true; notePanel true; textarea true; addButtons 3; boardColumns 2; no overflow/clipped text/errors.
static: ASCII verified for web/index.html, web/app.js, web/styles.css, and web/README.md

next_actions: Extend browser-local blocker annotations into Path Map blocker nodes.
Add export/import for local Atlas preferences and notes so a forked repo can preserve operator memory.
Add a small notes count badge to the lane list and Progression Constellation.
